---
title: "Intermediate Elective 2"
author: June McNally
date: 2026-05-10
format: pdf
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---


# Set Up

## Packages

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
```


```{r}
aquatic_data <- read_excel("../data/Aquatic Sampling Data-2026-03-10 (5).xlsx")
taxon_list <- read_csv("../data/taxon_list.csv")
```

```{r}
list.files("../data")
```

```{r}
aquatic_data <- read_excel("../data/Aquatic Sampling Data-2026-03-10 (5).xlsx")
taxon_list <- read_csv("../data/taxon_list.csv")
```
```{r}
list.files("../data")
```

```{r}
list.files("../data")
list.files(".")
```

```{r}
list.files("~/git/intermediate-elective", recursive = TRUE)
```
